messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0160",
  "title": "消除",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 消除

message.content: This section consists solely of the heading "消除" (Elimination/Removal) and contains no substantive content. It can only answer high-level navigational questions regarding the presence of an elimination or removal topic within the document. It does not provide or reference any specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types, and therefore cannot answer detailed questions about the methods, scope, context, or outcomes of any elimination process.
